response.overview: Guan Qing Yue is a valiant heroine who fought bravely on the battlefield alongside her father, earning accolades for her contributions to the defense of Li State. However, after her father Guan Cang Hai was wrongfully accused during a battle, their family faced severe injustices. Upon retiring, she relocated to Ye Country, adopting the name Guan Feng Yue, and established Menghuilou to assist those impacted by war. After the storm subsided, Guan Feng Yue transformed Menghui Tower into Menghui Academy. The two joined forces to create a peaceful and prosperous age for the people and finally stayed together for a long time.
response.title: 风月不相关
